title: Create load_data.py — HDF5 flattening and resampling
acceptance_criteria: Reads the merged_inertial_sensor HDF5 file and flattens to a DataFrame with columns: timestamp, participant, exercise, accel_x, accel_y, accel_z, gyro_x, gyro_y, gyro_z, lin_accel_x, lin_accel_y, lin_accel_z
Resamples all participants to 100 Hz (P4 downsampled from 500 Hz)
Returns a clean DataFrame with added participant and exercise label columns
Handles all 4 participants x 3 exercises = 12 sessions correctly
Script is importable as a module function (e.g., load_data())
